'''vasozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachful|coachful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachful|coachful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vasozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væsezheth|væsezheth]] || [[word:væsezhej|væsezhej]] || [[word:væsezhesh|væsezhesh]] || [[word:væsezhe|væsezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vasosozhoth|vasosozhoth]] || [[word:vasosozhoj|vasosozhoj]] || [[word:vasosozhosh|vasosozhosh]] || [[word:vasosozho|vasosozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vasozhoth|vasozhoth]] || [[word:vasozhoj|vasozhoj]] || [[word:vasozhosh|vasozhosh]] || [[word:vasozho|vasozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vasofzhoth|vasofzhoth]] || [[word:vasofzhoj|vasofzhoj]] || [[word:vasofzhosh|vasofzhosh]] || [[word:vasofzhof|vasofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vasozhotho|vasozhotho]] || [[word:vasozhojo|vasozhojo]] || [[word:vasozhosho|vasozhosho]] || [[word:vasozhoko|vasozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vasozhoth|vasozhoth]] || [[word:vasozhoj|vasozhoj]] || [[word:vasozhosh|vasozhosh]] || [[word:vasozho|vasozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vasozhothol|vasozhothol]] || [[word:vasozhojol|vasozhojol]] || [[word:vasozhoshol|vasozhoshol]] || [[word:vasozhokol|vasozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vasozhothotho|vasozhothotho]] || [[word:vasozhojojo|vasozhojojo]] || [[word:vasozhoshosho|vasozhoshosho]] || [[word:vasozhoko|vasozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vasozhothon|vasozhothon]] || [[word:vasozhojon|vasozhojon]] || [[word:vasozhoshon|vasozhoshon]] || [[word:vasozhokon|vasozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vasozhothoro|vasozhothoro]] || [[word:vasozhojoro|vasozhojoro]] || [[word:vasozhoshoro|vasozhoshoro]] || [[word:vasozhokoro|vasozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
